title: Integrated GameSession architecture and PR-1 reviewed task DAG
summary: Inventory the reusable M0-M8 simulation assets and define the single authoritative continuously running GameSession contract, migration plan, product projection/save boundaries, and a limited executable PR-1 task DAG without starting implementation.
acceptance: Inventory maps existing M1-M8 stores, scenario runners, Worker modes, projections and save surfaces into reuse, adapt, retire or test-only categories
Architecture defines one authoritative GameSession lifecycle, continuous fixed-30-TPS Worker scheduling, pause/speed semantics and Headless/Worker parity without UI authority
Architecture defines scenario initialization, product read-model, presentation interpolation and authoritative save/load boundaries that remove static product-gate fixtures from default gameplay
Reviewed PR-1 task DAG is limited to the smallest integrated-session tranche, identifies file ownership and allows no more than three concurrent write-heavy tasks
Planning records migration and rollback risks, protected regression facts and measurable PR-1 exit gates
No GameSession implementation, public protocol/schema/save mutation, product UI implementation or release action is executed
forbiddenPaths: claiming or promoting PR-1 implementation tasks before this planning task is verified and done
creating PR-2 or later implementation task packets
public release, Early Access, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or public save compatibility actions
